title: Upgrade report date_range UI to calendar range picker with no-future constraint

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implementing DateRangeParameter UI upgrade to popover range calendar using existing shadcn calendar primitives. Constraints: disable future dates, preserve emitted  format and existing flattening/dispatch behavior.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented calendar-based date range picker in dashboard DateRangeParameter. Behavior: range selection via popover calendar, disallow selecting dates after today, preserve emitted value format as {start,end} in YYYY-MM-DD for existing dispatch flattening.
